input.task_description: Scope automation work for a new client running a partner program. They have ~60 active partners, process applications manually, do tiering by gut feel, send communications one-by-one, and track everything in spreadsheets. They want to modernize but don't know where to start. Current tools: Google Sheets, Gmail, Slack.

output:
## Automation Scoping: Partner Program Modernization

### Current Workflows Mapped

| Workflow | Frequency | Current Method | Time/Week | Automation Potential |
|----------|-----------|---------------|-----------|---------------------|
| Application review | ~10/month | Manual email reading | 3h | Partial — screening automates, judgment stays human |
| Tier assignment | Quarterly | Gut feel in spreadsheet | 5h | High — data-driven thresholds automate |
| Partner communications | Weekly | One-by-one Gmail | 4h | High — templated, triggered by events |
| Revenue tracking | Monthly | Manual spreadsheet update | 3h | High — API sync from payment platform |
| Onboarding new partners | Per acceptance | Manual multi-step | 2h each | High — sequential system updates automate |

### Automation Boundary

**Automate:**
- Threshold checks (MRR above $X → tier upgrade) — binary, data-driven
- Data enrichment (find email, company info) — structured input, deterministic output
- Application screening (MRR/CSAT minimums) — binary criteria
- Communication triggers (welcome emails, status updates) — templated
- Revenue sync from payment platform — API, scheduled

**Keep Human:**
- Partner selection (should we accept this applicant?) — requires judgment
- Quality assessment (is this partner's work good enough for top tier?) — requires context
- Exception handling for demotions — requires relationship awareness
- Strategic communications (tier announcements, program changes) — requires tone

### System Connections Needed
- Application form → CRM (currently: manual copy-paste)
- Payment platform → Scoring table (currently: monthly spreadsheet)
- Scoring table → Dashboard (currently: doesn't exist)
- Event triggers → Communication platform (currently: manual Gmail)

### Phase Plan

**Phase 1: Stabilize (weeks 1-4, ~8h/week)**
- Document all existing workflows completely
- Set up Clay as central partner table (migrate from spreadsheets)
- Connect payment platform API for automated revenue tracking
- Establish the row unit: one row = one partner

**Phase 2: Build (weeks 5-12, ~10h/week)**
- Application pipeline: form → Clay → auto-screening → manual review queue
- Tiering system: scoring vectors, thresholds from actual data distribution
- Communication automation: n8n workflows for triggered emails
- Dashboard: internal view (full metrics) + external view (points/tier only)

### Missing Access (Blockers)
- Payment platform API credentials
- Historical revenue data for tier threshold calibration
- Client decision: which CRM to use going forward

### Hour Estimate
- Phase 1: 32 hours (4 weeks × 8h)
- Phase 2: 80 hours (8 weeks × 10h)
- Total: ~112 hours over 3 months
- Complexity: multi-tool tiering system → 2-month minimum engagement recommended
